'''yabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ginormously|ginormously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-b-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ginormously|ginormously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yabate|yabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yabatesher|yabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yabatesherĂ«m|yabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yabatero|yabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yabateshĂ«|yabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yabateshĂ«m|yabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyabatero|gokiyabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyabateshĂ«|gokiyabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyabateshĂ«m|gokiyabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyabankerom|goyabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyabankeshĂ«|goyabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyabankeshĂ«m|goyabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyabankeya|goyabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yabaterom|yabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yabatemu|yabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yabateya|yabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyabaterom|gokiyabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyabatemu|gokiyabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyabateya|gokiyabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yababate|yababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yababatesher|yababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yababatesherĂ«m|yababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yababatero|yababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yababateshĂ«|yababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yababateshĂ«m|yababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyababatero|gokiyababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyababateshĂ«|gokiyababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyababateshĂ«m|gokiyababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyababankerom|goyababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyababankeshĂ«|goyababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyababankeshĂ«m|goyababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyababankeya|goyababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yababaterom|yababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yababatemu|yababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yababateya|yababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyababaterom|gokiyababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyababatemu|gokiyababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyababateya|gokiyababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠbĂŠte|yĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠbĂŠtesher|yĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠbĂŠtero|yĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠbĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠbĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠbĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠbĂŠtemu|yĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠbĂŠteya|yĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠbĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠbĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafbafte|yafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafbaftesher|yafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafbaftesherĂ«m|yafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafbaftero|yafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafbafteshĂ«|yafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafbafteshĂ«m|yafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafbaftero|gokiyafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafbafteshĂ«|gokiyafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafbafteshĂ«m|gokiyafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafbafnkerom|goyafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafbafnkeshĂ«|goyafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafbafnkeshĂ«m|goyafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafbafnkeya|goyafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafbafterom|yafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafbaftemu|yafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafbafteya|yafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafbafterom|gokiyafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafbaftemu|gokiyafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafbafteya|gokiyafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
